title: TRIROCKS Solar Lanterns Outdoor Garden, 2 Pack Large Black Rattan Lights, Waterproof for Patio, Pathway & Yard Decoration (Black)

The large solar lantern emits a soft, warm glow, perfect for enhancing your outdoor lantern decor. Ideal for patios, gardens, or pathways, these solar lights outdoor garden lantern create a cozy ambiance.

No manual operation needed—the solar lantern outdoor garden automatically lights up at dusk and turns off at dawn, saving energy while providing reliable outdoor solar lights illumination.

【IP65 Waterproof & Durable】Designed for all weather, these solar garden lights withstand rain, snow, and humidity. The garden solar lights are built to last, ensuring year-round performance in any outdoor lights setting—perfect for gardens, yards, or porches.

【2-Pack Multi-Use Lanterns】This set of solar lanterns offers versatility—hang them on trees, place them on tabletops, or line your walkway. The lightweight rattan solar lantern is easy to move, making it a stylish addition to garden lights solar powered setups.

【Reliable After-Sales Support】: Each solar lights outdoor undergoes strict quality checks. If any issues arise, contact us for prompt assistance—we guarantee a hassle-free solution for your solar garden lantern needs!
